title: cirsium × brueggeri
intro: Cirsium × brueggeri, also known as the Bruegger's thistle, is a hybrid plant species within the thistle family (Cirsium) and is native to the mountainous regions of the western United States and Canada. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties that may help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Cirsium × brueggeri include its potential to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as its ability to support the immune system. Cirsium × brueggeri can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and salves for topical use, making it a versatile and accessible medicinal plant.
